game.title: El día de San Patricio
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango need to find their friend Patricio in town, then deliver a lucky clover to him

mechanics.core_loop: Find hidden Patricio in busy town scenes, then find the clover to deliver to him

controls.tap: Tap on objects/characters to check if it's Patricio or the clover

phases.task: Find Patricio hiding in the scene
Find the lucky clover to deliver

visuals.background: Colorful Mexican town scene with many objects/characters
visuals.patricio: Green lizard with shamrock hat, partially hidden
visuals.clover: Four-leaf clover emoji ☘️, small and hidden

instructions_text: ¡Encuentra a Patricio escondido en el pueblo! Luego busca el trébol para dárselo.
